topic: Building an agentic AI system on Google Cloud to analyze CCTV and drone security footage in real-time, detect threats and anomalies, and trigger automated alerts using Vertex AI Agent Engine and Gemini
question_text: How would you design and implement an agentic AI system on Google Cloud to analyze real-time CCTV and drone security footage, detect threats and anomalies, and trigger automated alerts using Vertex AI Agent Engine and Gemini?
hook_text: Build a hyper-scalable agentic AI for real-time security. Detect threats from CCTV and drone footage instantly on Google Cloud.
cta_text: Master agentic AI on GCP for your next interview!

answer_sections.title: Ingestion & Pre-processing
answer_sections.text: Stream CCTV/drone footage. Cloud IoT Core ingests real-time data. Dataflow processes video, frames extracted. Stored in Cloud Storage buckets.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Real-time video ingests via Cloud IoT Core. Dataflow pre-processes, extracts frames, stores in Cloud Storage.

answer_sections.title: Agentic Threat Detection
answer_sections.text: Vertex AI Agent Engine orchestrates. Gemini 3.1 Flash Image analyzes frames. Detects threats, anomalies, and suspicious activity. Publishes events to Pub/Sub.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Vertex AI Agent Engine orchestrates. Gemini 3.1 Flash Image analyzes frames, detects threats and anomalies.

answer_sections.title: Alerting & Response
answer_sections.text: Pub/Sub triggers Cloud Functions. Automated alerts sent to security. Integrates with PagerDuty. Cloud Logging and Monitoring track activity and system health.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Pub/Sub triggers Cloud Functions for alerts. Integrates with PagerDuty. Cloud Logging and Monitoring ensures system health.

diagrams.title: Agentic Analysis
diagrams.dsl: [[Cloud Storage (Frames)]] -> (Vertex AI Agent Engine) -> (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image) -> [Anomaly Detection] -> (Cloud Pub/Sub)
